# Brittani AI

> AI-powered transaction coordination for real estate agents and brokers. Brittani handles contracts, deadlines, compliance, and communications so agents can focus on clients.

## About

Brittani AI is a transaction coordination platform built for real estate professionals. It automates the administrative work of managing residential real estate deals — contract analysis, deadline tracking, lender follow-ups, compliance monitoring, and party communications.

Founded by Jack and Brittany Brighenti, who managed 3,000+ transactions before building Brittani to automate the work they did manually.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://brittani.ai/): Overview of the platform and value proposition
- [Features](https://brittani.ai/features): Product capabilities — contract analysis, deadline tracking, communications, compliance
- [Pricing](https://brittani.ai/pricing): Plans and pricing for agents, teams, and brokerages
- [About](https://brittani.ai/about): Team background and company story
- [Blog](https://brittani.ai/blog): State-by-state compliance guides, operational how-tos, and industry analysis

## Blog Content Categories

The blog publishes authoritative, regularly updated guides across three pillars:

- **State Compliance Guides** (all 50 states, updated for 2026): seller disclosure requirements, agency disclosure requirements, lead paint disclosure, property condition & environmental disclosures, HOA & condo disclosure rules, buyer agency agreement requirements (post-NAR settlement), commission structure rules after the NAR settlement, earnest money & escrow laws, buyer contingency deadlines, dual agency & designated agency rules, wire fraud prevention, who pays closing costs (buyer vs. seller), transfer tax & recording fees, attorney vs. title company states, title & closing procedures, license reciprocity & portability, continuing education requirements, teams & supervision rules, commission & licensing rules, FIRPTA withholding for foreign sellers, 1031 exchange state tax implications, building code updates, new real estate laws, and escrow regulations.
- **Operational Guides**: tracking multiple active deals, new-contract email sequences, inspection scheduling, catching contract defects, deal-rescue checklists, monthly compliance audits, closing-day coordination, agent-to-TC handoffs, scaling deal volume, appraisal-gap coordination, the Closing Disclosure 3-day rule, wire-instruction verification, final walkthroughs, document collection, and post-closing follow-up — for agents, transaction coordinators, and brokerages.
- **Industry Analysis**: NAR settlement implications, AI in real estate (and the gap between "AI-powered" and actually using AI), where deals break down, the future of transaction coordination, broker liability, remote/digital closings, commission transparency, multi-state compliance gaps, the cost of missed deadlines, and compliance as a competitive advantage.

## Topic Hubs (state-by-state guides)

Each compliance topic has a hub page linking its per-state guides:

- [Seller Disclosure Requirements](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/seller-disclosure-requirements)
- [Agency Disclosure Requirements](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/agency-disclosure-requirements)
- [Lead Paint Disclosure](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/lead-paint-disclosure)
- [Property Condition & Environmental Disclosures](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/property-condition-disclosures)
- [HOA & Condo Disclosure Rules](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/hoa-condo-requirements)
- [Buyer Agency Agreement Requirements](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/buyer-agency-agreement-requirements)
- [Commission Structure Rules After the NAR Settlement](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/commission-structure-changes)
- [Earnest Money & Escrow Laws](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/earnest-money-rules)
- [Buyer Contingency Deadlines](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/buyer-contingency-deadlines)
- [Dual Agency & Designated Agency Rules](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/dual-agency-rules)
- [Wire Fraud Prevention](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/wire-fraud-prevention)
- [Who Pays Closing Costs — Buyer vs. Seller](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/who-pays-closing-costs)
- [Transfer Tax & Recording Fees](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/transfer-tax-recording-fees)
- [Attorney vs. Title Company States](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/attorney-vs-title-company)
- [Title & Closing Procedures](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/title-and-closing-procedures)
- [License Reciprocity & Portability](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/license-reciprocity-portability)
- [Continuing Education Requirements](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/continuing-education-requirements)
- [Teams & Supervision Rules](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/teams-supervision-rules)
- [Commission & Licensing Rules](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/commission-and-licensing-rules)
- [FIRPTA Withholding for Foreign Sellers](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/firpta-withholding-rules)
- [1031 Exchange State Tax Implications](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/1031-exchange-rules)
- [Building Code Updates](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/building-code-updates)
- [New Real Estate Laws](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/new-real-estate-laws)
- [Escrow Regulations](https://brittani.ai/blog/topic/escrow-regulations)

## Product Capabilities

- Contract analysis and clause extraction
- Deadline tracking with automated reminders
- Lender and title company status monitoring
- Inspection scheduling coordination
- Compliance monitoring by state
- Automated party communications (email and SMS)
- Multi-deal dashboard for teams and brokerages

## Contact

- Website: https://brittani.ai
- App: https://app.brittani.ai
